issues.title: HTMX main nav entry missing tab bar
issues.attack: Sidebar hx-get targets #main-content, but settings_profile HTMX response returns only profile partial without tab bar. Tab UI never appears on primary entry.
issues.response: Confirmed. Plan must add HX-Target detection: #main-content gets full tab shell, #settings-content gets tab partial only.

issues.title: Email POST returns wrong template
issues.attack: Email form POSTs to email_settings endpoint which returns email_settings.html (full page with own header/back button), breaking tab context.
issues.response: Confirmed. Template must POST to settings_email instead. View POST handling must be added as companion change.

issues.title: Telegram actions return non-partial responses
issues.attack: telegram:test and telegram:unbind render telegram_bind.html (full page), not the tab partial. Tab context destroyed after test/unbind.
issues.response: Confirmed. Templates must use partial-aware endpoints. Partial variants needed for test/unbind.

issues.title: Tests too weak (t13 R1-04 unaddressed)
issues.attack: Step 7 only runs existing status_code tests. No content verification despite t13 CRITICAL flag.
issues.response: Accepted. Must add tab bar text verification, active tab content checks, HTMX partial content validation.

issues.title: Style tokens inconsistent
issues.attack: Templates use text-[14px], focus:ring-indigo-500 vs project convention focus:ring-primary.
issues.response: Accepted as MINOR. Will note preferred tokens in plan.

issues.title: Hardcoded terms/privacy URLs
issues.attack: Step 3 uses /terms/ and /privacy/ instead of {% url %} tags.
issues.response: Valid. Will use {% url 'terms' %} and {% url 'privacy' %}.

issues.title: HTMX redirect for /accounts/settings/ not handled
issues.attack: settings_page 302 redirect may cause full page reload for HTMX requests.
issues.response: Outside t14 scope (view logic). HTMX follows 302 redirects transparently.
